name: Irish Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not expect these to be like American pancakes, but they have an excellent flavor.
2. Mix all ingredients together.
3. Beat the mixture well until combined.
4. Grease a griddle or pan.
5. Pour the batter onto the greased surface.
6. Cook on both sides until browned and golden.
7. This recipe makes approximately 8-10 pancakes.
Origin: Hearth and Home Companion
Shared by: Sharon Stevens.
